name: OpenClaw Mindsets
description: Multiple agents acting as one. Thread-based context orchestration.

autoSubscribe.description: Discord user IDs to auto-add to every new thread.

displayName.description: Name shown on webhook posts (thread creation, action blocks, recovery). Defaults to main agent name or 'Mindsets'.

categoryId.description: Discord category ID where new mindset forum channels are created.

show_housekeeping.description: Whether to post visible housekeeping/routing embeds in Discord. Analysis still runs and injects as context regardless. Default: false.
